MARSHAL JAMES BRADLEY

US Marshal • Alpha's Ally

Profile

US Marshal who developed respect for Subject Alpha during training wars. Became unofficial ally despite Alpha's rogue status. Maintains favor-owed relationship that could be called upon.

Specialties

  • • Federal Operations
  • • Training Programs
  • • International Cooperation
  • • Asset Protection

Key Metrics

Years Active
18
Operations Led
Classified
Countries Operated
USA, International assignments
Classification
ACTIVE

Key Operations

2010
Training Encounter
First impressed by Subject Alpha's capabilities
2015
Favor Established
Developed mutual respect, unofficial alliance
2018
Capture Period
Alpha imprisoned under US custody
2018
Prison Escape
Alpha escaped via mafia deal, Bradley's involvement unclear
